channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Adding leflunomide to prednisone may not boost remission rates in Takayasu arteritis
item.description: Leflunomide plus prednisone was well tolerated but did not significantly increase clinical remission of Takayasu arteritis compared to prednisone alone.

item.title: Study finds first evidence of dopamine system injury in long COVID patients' brains
item.description: A brain imaging study by CAMH researchers, published in eBioMedicine, provides the strongest evidence yet of dopamine system injury in long COVID.

item.title: Breast cancer rates rising sharply among Asian American women, study finds
item.description: A UC San Francisco study reveals an alarming increase in invasive breast cancer among Asian American women over the past two decades.

item.title: First E-STAR annual report provides unprecedented insight into early kidney transplant access
item.description: Chronic kidney disease affects millions, and over 800,000 Americans live with end-stage kidney disease. The report highlights early access to transplantation.
